svg.title: OSCS Clip Automation Pipeline v2
svg.desc: Updated flowchart showing Shorts pipeline plus separate long-form weekly and monthly compilation tracks.

g.text: Polls top clips by views, 2–3 hrs after stream ends — all 9 OSCS + friends
Preview link · suggested title · streamer credited
React ✅ to approve · ❌ to skip · reply to edit title
You can also send a clip link yourself and the bot picks it up
Holds approved clips, drip-posts so you don't flood the feed
Auto title, description, streamer socials, Twitch link · also saved to archive

svg.text: Future: theme compilations, creator-specific recaps, milestone videos — all from archive
